g.title: cluster_mono
g.text: REPO 1 · provenance — the monorepo, npm workspace of six packages

g.title: jcore
g.text: pure Kotlin port of the format

g.title: allow
g.text: refreshed by npm run update-hashes after
every recorder release, in any language

g.title: ncore
g.text: pure Lua port of the format

g.title: logcore
g.text: event types · JCS · hash chain · validator
ZERO dependencies on vscode, node:*, fs, path or the DOM
— enforced by an ESLint no-restricted-imports rule

g.title: shared
g.text: Zod schemas — the HTTP API contract,
imported by BOTH ends so they cannot drift

g.title: acore
g.text: ISOMORPHIC — same restricted-import rule, so the
identical code runs in Node and in the browser

g.title: gapi
g.text: HTTP client — three public behaviours only

g.title: rule
g.text: A format change is a cross-repo, signature-affecting,
test-vector-pinned decision owned by the monorepo.
It is never made unilaterally in a sibling repo to make
